description: RB2B identifies the people behind your US website traffic and pushes person-level leads to Slack and your CRM in real time for fast follow-up.
overview: RB2B matches website visitors to real people and companies, pushing person-level leads to Slack and CRMs in real time, with filters for firmographic and behavioral data.
what_is: RB2B is a website visitor identification tool that resolves traffic to person-level identity for US visitors and company-level identity more broadly. It turns anonymous visits into named leads you can follow up on, with real-time data pushed to tools like Slack and your CRM.

It is most useful for surfacing high-value leads filtered by attributes like company size, revenue, or location. Setup takes minutes, and leads start appearing in Slack almost immediately, so teams can act on intent without waiting.

RB2B integrates with many apps including Salesforce, HubSpot, and Slack, fitting the GTM stack for enrichment and outreach. Person-level identification is US-focused due to privacy rules like GDPR, so its sweet spot is fast US lead identification.
